formName: Step 4 - Location and Land Details for Water Licence Application
formDescription: This section collects comprehensive land details where water will be used. Fields will dynamically adjust based on whether the land is Private, Provincial Crown, or Other.

LandOwnershipCategory.title: What is the category of land ownership?
LandOwnershipCategory.description: Select the category that best describes the ownership of the land (Private, Provincial Crown, or Other).

LegalDescription.title: Legal Description:
LegalDescription.description: The official full legal description of the property parcel as recorded in the land title system.

ParcelIdentifierPID.title: Parcel Identifier (PID):
ParcelIdentifierPID.description: The nine-digit number used to identify a parcel of land in the BC Land Title Register.

CertificateOfTitleNo.title: Certificate of Title No:
CertificateOfTitleNo.description: The identification number of the Certificate of Title for the property.

MetesAndBounds.title: Metes and Bounds (description of unsurveyed land):
MetesAndBounds.description: A detailed technical description of the boundaries for land that has not been officially surveyed.

MineralTenureNumber.title: Mineral Tenure Number:
MineralTenureNumber.description: The identification number associated with mineral rights or tenure on the property.

LandTenureNumber.title: Lands File Number:
LandTenureNumber.description: The provincial file number associated with the land tenure.

OtherPermits.title: Other Permits (Provide Type & Number):
OtherPermits.description: Information regarding any other relevant provincial or local permits for the land.
